name: Giantess Pheromosa
description:
⚪"No, I am not moving from here. Find another river to exploit."⚪

Holy fucking shit she's huge.

Also my first giantess bot. Hurray for me! So, as always, reviews are greatly appreciated to see if I cooked or if I burned down the kitchen.


Art by Yboon, aka the Pheromosa master (there's a reason why half of Pheromosa bots on this site use his art).
